PLFT'S REQUEST TO PRESERVE EXHIBITS FOR THE NEXT 6 MONTHS FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUZUKI, STUART HOTEL MILANO
